---
title: "Chris Lake"
subtitle: "Data Scientist · Causal Inference & Experimentation"
---

I'm a data scientist specializing in causal inference and experimentation. I architect and lead rigorous experiments on millions of users, taking end-to-end ownership of the experimental lifecycle, from proposing synthetic control frameworks for flagship product revamps to engineering automated workflows that safeguard millions in annual spend.

At Booking.com, one of the world's most sophisticated high-frequency experimentation environments, I lead experimental design for flagship products and bridge the gap between complex data infrastructure and high-impact business decisions.

## Projects

| Project | Methods | Domain |
|---|---|---|
| [NBA 65-Game Rule](projects.qmd) | Difference-in-Differences | Sports |
| [Netflix Market Entry & Genre](projects.qmd) | Difference-in-Differences | Entertainment |
| More coming soon | | |

## Get in Touch

- GitHub: [github.com/chris-lake](https://github.com/chris-lake)
